title: arctocrania suecica
intro: Arctocrania suecica, also known as Swedish golden root, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Arctocrania suecica include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Arctocrania suecica are often found in supplements and teas, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine in some parts of the world.
